claimText: RIMES is an intergovernmental body that evolved post the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami.
evidenceExcerpt: RIMES is an intergovernmental body that evolved post the 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and nature of RIMES.
distractorHooks: Is a United Nations specialized agency

claimText: The regional early warning centre of RIMES operates from the Asian Institute of Technology in Thailand.
evidenceExcerpt: It operates from its regional early warning centre at the Asian Institute of Technology in Thailand.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on the location of RIMES operations.

claimText: The Declaration on Disaster Preparedness was adopted at the 4th Ministerial Conference of RIMES in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
evidenceExcerpt: The Declaration on Disaster Preparedness was adopted at the 4th Ministerial Conference of RIMES in Colombo, Sri Lanka.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent disaster management declarations.

claimText: RIMES membership comprises 22 member states and 26 collaborating states.
evidenceExcerpt: Membership: 22 member states and 26 collaborating states.
examUse: Statement-based question on the membership size and structure of RIMES.
distractorHooks: Open only to Indian Ocean littoral states
